name: refactor-prep
description: Scope a refactor, produce a plan, and prepare the first PR.

steps.prompt: Use the Guild scope skill to produce a short brief on the refactor target. Identify the files, the public API surface, and the test coverage. Write the brief under .guild/runtime/refactor-prep/scope.md.
Invoke the Guild plan skill against the scope brief. Write the resulting plan under .guild/plans/refactor.md with status 'draft'.
Show the plan. The user will edit it inline or approve it.
Drive the plan to completion. Update the plan file's status to 'complete' when done.
Open a pull request against the default branch with a clear title, the plan link, and a 'Closes' reference for any tracked issue.
